calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-21-2005 Off Calendar

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Oct-19-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
For plaintiff and opposing party Exponent Failure Analysis: Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., 415-922-5939 specially appearing on behalf of the firm of Seals & Tanenbaum, 2323 W. Lincoln Avenue, Suite 127, Anaheim, CA 92801, 714-991-9131.
Defendant did not appear.

Ruling:
The Court iterated its finding that no opposition was timely filed. Counsel was unable to represent that the moving party had been noticed of today's appearance. Therefor the Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant Fred Ramirez motion to set aside default/default judgment/leave to defend is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Defendant Ramirez to prepare order. Reported by Christina Paxton, CSR #1558 (301/JLW)

Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Oct-07-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearance:
Elizabeth MacDonald for Plaintiff Exponent Failure Analysis Assoc. No other appearance.
Tentative Ruling adopted: Judgment Debtor's Claim of Exemption is denied. The levying officer is ordered to release any funds to the judgment creditor for payment on the judgment. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
